word: G865 - ἀφιλάγαθος - aphilágathos - af-il-ag'-ath-os - Despiser of those that are good

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Despiser of those that are good
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
opposed to goodness and good men
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1 (as a negative particle) and G5358; hostile to virtue: - depiser of those that are good.
